◎译　　名　转性青春日记 / Transzneműség
◎片　　名　Transhood
◎年　　代　2020
◎产　　地　美国

◎片　　长　96分钟
◎导　　演　莎伦 里斯 Sharon Liese

◎简　　介  

　　Filmed over five years in Kansas City, this documentary follows four kids - beginning at ages 4, 7, 12, and 15 - as they redefine "coming of age." These kids and their families reveal intimate realities of how gender is re-shaping the family next door in a never-before-told chronicling of growing up transgender in the heartland. The film is a nuanced examination of how families...
